description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features a combination of large windows, vertical accent columns, and a recessed entryway with a driveway and a parked car. The rear of the house opens to a private backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a small garden area, enclosed by a wooden fence. The exterior walls are finished in a mix of white plaster and light stone cladding, with large glass panels providing ample natural light. Palm trees and flowering shrubs are landscaped around the property, enhancing its contemporary urban appeal. The house includes multiple balconies and outdoor living spaces, emphasizing a seamless indoor-outdoor connection.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a private backyard featuring a pool and landscaped garden. The exterior combines white plaster and stone cladding, with clean lines and contemporary details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway with a car, vertical accent columns, and a mix of large and small windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, side windows, and a glimpse of the backyard with palm trees and fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, large glass doors, and a wooden fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden area, flowering tree, and the side of the house with minimal windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a single modern door, no steps, flanked by vertical columns and sheltered by the upper story
